diagnosis: Registry ParamDef for 'target_prefix' had no aliases, so Click only exposed --target-prefix; the playbook passed --prefix which Click rejected with 'No such option: --prefix'

files_changed.description: Added aliases=("--prefix",) to the target_prefix ParamDef in the bgp-hijacking entry so Click accepts --prefix as an alias for --target-prefix

notes: The factory (_make_option in matcha/commands/factory.py) already spreads pdef.aliases into Click param_decls, so no factory change is needed. requires_rebuild is false because registry.py is loaded at runtime — no Docker image rebuild is required.
